children.description: Element(s) wrapped by the resizable container.

defaultWidth.description: Initial width in pixels (uncontrolled). Strings are parsed for the leading number.

width.description: Controlled width in pixels. Provide together with `height` and listen to `onSizeChange`.

height.description: Controlled height in pixels. Provide together with `width` and listen to `onSizeChange`.

onSizeChange.description: Fires on every committed size change (mouse, touch, keyboard).

onResizeStart.description: Fires when the user grabs a handle.

onResizeEnd.description: Fires when the user releases the handle.

axis.description: Restrict resize direction. Handles incompatible with the axis are hidden.

grid.description: Snap size to a [widthStep, heightStep] grid.

aspectRatio.description: Lock to a specific aspect ratio (number) or to the starting ratio (true).

disabled.description: Disable all resize interaction; handles are hidden.

handleSize.description: Visual / hit area thickness of each handle in pixels.

showHandles.description: When handles are visible. `'hover'` reveals them on container hover or focus.

keyboardStep.description: Pixels per arrow-key press on a focused handle.

keyboardBigStep.description: Pixels per Shift+arrow press on a focused handle.

bounds.description: Optional upper bound for size. Useful inside scroll containers.

className.description: Class name applied to the container.

style.description: Inline styles for the container (merged with computed width/height).

handleClassName.description: Class name applied to every resize handle.

ariaLabel.description: Used as the prefix for each handle's aria-label, e.g. "Widget resize se".
